channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 13: SAIL, Dixon Tech, Vodafone Idea, HPCL, Berger Paints, Ather Energy among top gainers
item.description: Indian equities saw modest gains on May 13, with the Nifty 50 closing up 0.14% and the S&P BSE Sensex rising 0.08%.

item.title: Alibaba's core profit plunges 84% even as AI and cloud growth accelerate
item.description: Alibaba on Wednesday said its core profitability plunged in the March quarter amid heavy investments in tech and e-commerce.

item.title: Visakhapatnam gets ₹1,501.03 crore Centre nod for water, drainage projects; Madhurawada gets lion’s share
item.description: Funding under Urban Challenge Fund includes a 25% GoI grant of ₹375.26 crore, with multilateral financing from IFC and loans from Canara Bank and IOB

item.title: War latest news. Oil: IEA, unprecedented supply shock with Hormuz blockade. Record drop in stocks - Il Sole 24 ORE
item.description: War latest news. Oil: IEA, unprecedented supply shock with Hormuz blockade. Record drop in stocks Il Sole 24 ORE

item.title: Cyber Crime Wing notice for blocking social media posts draws criticism
item.description: Incidentally, most of the flagged URLs/posts allegedly contained content critical of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam and Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay

item.title: Ceasefire in sight? What's next for Russia's war in Ukraine - dw.com
item.description: Ceasefire in sight? What's next for Russia's war in Ukraine dw.com

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly session LIVE: Chief Minister Vijay's TVK wins trust vote with 144 ‘ayes’
item.description: Udhayanidhi led DMK MLAs' walkout prior to voting; 25 rebel AIADMK MLAs from C.Ve. Shanmugam camp extended support to TVK while 22 AIADMK MLAs of the Edappadi Palaniswami faction voted against the confidence motion.

item.title: ATS raids over 40 places in Maharashtra, questions 53 suspects linked to Pakistan-based gangster
item.description: The raids were being conducted since morning in Mumbai, Akola, Nanded, Pune, Mira Road (in Thane district), Nallasopara (Palghar district), Nashik, Jalgaon, Nagpur and various other places in the State, the official said

item.title: Konthuruthy river puramboke eviction: families withdraw case; settle for compensation
item.description: In an interim order, the High Court had directed eviction while entrusting the Kochi Corporation and the Revenue Department to finalise and implement rehabilitation measures within four months

item.title: Softbank's AI Investments Catalyze Fivefold Profit Surge - India IPO
item.description: Softbank's AI Investments Catalyze Fivefold Profit Surge India IPO

item.title: Assam feels safer with BJP in power in West Bengal: Himanta Biswa Sarma
item.description: A day after taking oath as the Chief Minister for the second straight term, he says the political alignment between the two neighbouring States would improve coordination to face shared challenges

item.title: Iran war drives energy price spike, wages struggle to keep up with inflation - KJRH
item.description: Iran war drives energy price spike, wages struggle to keep up with inflation KJRH

item.title: Stock market today: Sensex gains 50 points, Nifty 50 ends above 23,400; mid, small-caps outperform
item.description: The Sensex ended 50 points, or 0.07%, higher at 74,608.98, while the Nifty 50 rose by 33points, or 0.14%, to end at 23,412.60.

item.title: Iran war shows military force alone cannot be solution to conflicts: T.S. Tirumurti
item.description: The former Ambassador and Permanent Representative of India to the United Nations was speaking at the inauguration of Diplomacy and Sustainability Dialogues 2026, jointly organised by Saveetha Institute of Medical and Technical Sciences (SIMATS) and The Hindu

item.title: A plan to make drugs in orbit is going commercial
item.description: Varda Space Industries, a startup that’s been pitching its ability to perform drug experiments in space, says it has signed up the pharmaceutical company United Therapeutics in what may be remembered as a notable step toward in-orbit manufacturing. The idea of building things in outer space for use on Earth has so far been explored…

item.title: Cabinet raises Minimum Support Prices for 14 kharif crops
item.description: The Union Cabinet has approved significant hikes in Minimum Support Prices for 14 Kharif crops for the 2026-27 marketing season. Sunflower Seed sees the largest absolute increase. Cotton and other oilseeds also receive substantial boosts. MSPs for all notified Kharif crops are set at least 50% above production costs. Common paddy MSP is fixed at Rs 2,441 per quintal.

item.title: Flipkart Faces 18% GST On Delivery Charges After Relief Bid Fails
item.description: Walmart-owned Flipkart suffered a setback after the West Bengal Appellate Authority for Advance Ruling (WBAAAR) reportedly struck down a proposed…

item.title: India should have stepped into vacuum left by U.S. as guarantor of security in West Asia: Talmiz Ahmad
item.description: Speaking on the topic ‘India’s Diplomatic Balancing in West Asia: Strategic Autonomy, Energy Security and Global Responsibility’, the former Ambassador remarked that “India is not a serious role-player as far as West Asia and the crisis over the last two and a half years is concerned.”

item.title: China tech giant Tencent sees Q1 profit jump after AI bets
item.description: Tencent reported a 21% surge in quarterly net profit, reaching 58.1 billion yuan, driven by significant investments in the booming artificial intelligence sector. The tech giant is actively competing in AI, unveiling model upgrades and reportedly considering investments in startups, despite rising AI costs impacting margins.

item.title: The class politics of modern outbreaks
item.description: The MV Hondius hantavirus scare revived debates about luxury travel, public health and unequal vulnerability to disease.

item.title: How A 30-Year-Old Nashik Student Leaked NEET Paper 45 Hours Before Exam
item.description: He had changed his appearance by cutting his hair in an attempt to evade detection.

item.title: Mossad chief said to have visited UAE during Iran war - Breakingthenews.net
item.description: Mossad chief said to have visited UAE during Iran war Breakingthenews.net

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: Jaipur Brothers Allegedly Bought Paper For Rs 15 Lakh
item.description: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: Mangilal And dinesh have been arrested.

item.title: Bengal CM Adhikari to retain Bhabanipur Assembly segment, give up Nandigram
item.description: Mr. Adhikari defeated TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee in her Bhabanipur bastion in the recently concluded Assembly polls by a margin of 15,105 in a teeterboard battle

item.title: Alibaba quarterly revenue rises on cloud demand, ecommerce growth
item.description: Alibaba's revenue climbed 3% driven by strong cloud and AI growth, with its China e-commerce unit boosted by government subsidies. Despite economic headwinds, the tech giant's enterprise AI platform shows promise. While cloud revenue exceeded expectations, overall revenue slightly missed estimates due to international e-commerce.

item.title: Mumbai’s first major voter roll revision in 24 years may face delay as BMC urges ECI to avoid May drive
Do you know why companies pay dividends? Key facts investors should know
item.description: Dividends are a way for companies to distribute excess cash to shareholders, often indicating financial strength and stable earnings. They can enhance investor demand, influence capital allocation, and are typically associated with mature companies with steady cash flows.

item.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Gains 70 Points, Nifty Up 45 Amid Mixed Global Cues
item.description: Sensex Today, Stock Market, Nifty, Share Market Live News Updates: Markets Open In Red.

item.title: US CPI records biggest jump in 3 years: Can the Fed raise interest rates after hot inflation data?
item.description: The US consumer price index has jumped to a three-year high of 3.8%, prompting questions about potential interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. Economists weigh in on the impacts of rising oil prices and economic stability, leaving the market in suspense about future monetary policy.

item.title: India Loses $18.3 Billion On Edible Oil Imports. Why Don't We Produce It?
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has urged citizens to cut down on the use of vegetable oil.

item.title: Older Than Stonehenge: 5,000-Year-Old Artificial Island Discovered In Scotland
item.description: The crannog at Loch Bhorgastail.

item.title: Why are oil prices down and gas rates steady today, and will Brent crude, US WTI futures, Dutch and Britis - The Economic Times
item.description: Why are oil prices down and gas rates steady today, and will Brent crude, US WTI futures, Dutch and Britis The Economic Times

item.title: AI orders flow in at Germany's Siemens but profit slips
item.description: Siemens is witnessing a significant surge in orders driven by the AI boom, particularly from data centre investments. Despite a slight dip in quarterly profit, the company's infrastructure division saw record growth. Siemens anticipates this AI-fueled demand to continue strongly for several years.

item.title: Citi Sees India's Power Demand Rising 5%-6% Annually Amid Energy Buildout - Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com
item.description: Citi Sees India's Power Demand Rising 5%-6% Annually Amid Energy Buildout Crude Oil Prices Today | OilPrice.com

item.title: India Deploys AI Push to Detect Mule Accounts, Cyber Financial Fraud - Analytics India Magazine
item.description: India Deploys AI Push to Detect Mule Accounts, Cyber Financial Fraud Analytics India Magazine

item.title: WazirX launches crypto Futures with lowest trading fees and no volume threshold
item.description: WazirX has launched crypto Futures trading for Indian traders, offering the lowest maker and taker fees in the market without volume thresholds. This move aims to democratize derivatives trading by allowing direct INR access and prioritizing user education on responsible practices. The initiative also supports WazirX's ongoing restructuring efforts by generating profits for creditor recoveries.

item.title: PFC Q4 Results: Profit rises 24% to Rs 6,325 crore as interest income grows
item.description: Power Finance Corp reported a strong rise in fourth-quarter and full-year earnings for FY26, supported by higher interest income, improved fee income and a reversal in impairment provisions. Lower credit costs and steady growth in core lending operations helped the state-run power sector financier deliver improved profitability despite higher finance costs.

item.title: Pine Labs shares crash 20% as six-month IPO lock-in ends; down 31% from issue price
item.description: Pine Labs shares dropped 20% to ₹151 on May 13 as a six-month lock-in for pre-IPO investors ended, allowing 92.4 crore shares to trade. The stock has declined 31.6% from its IPO price of ₹221.

item.title: Dividend alert! HPCL announces Rs 19.25/share dividend, its highest in five years. Check record date
item.description: HPCL has declared a final dividend of Rs 19.25 per share, its highest payout in five years, with August 14 set as the record date. Shares gained 4% after the announcement, even as the stock remains down in 2026. Q4 profit rose 46% to Rs 4,902 crore.

item.title: Raiffeisen Raises Addiko Takeover Offer as Bidding Race Heats Up
item.description: Raiffeisen Bank International AG improved its bid to buy Addiko Bank AG, intensifying the race to buy the Balkans consumer lending specialist.
